name: n8n (with persistent community nodes)
description: Self-hosted n8n workflow automation with community nodes baked into the image so they survive Heroku dyno restarts.

N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Secret key used to encrypt credentials in the database. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32

N8N_BASIC_AUTH_USER.description: Username for basic auth (only needed if N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE=true)

N8N_BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD.description: Password for basic auth (only needed if N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE=true)

DB_TYPE.description: Database type. Use 'sqlite' for quick start or 'postgresdb' for persistent storage.

DB_POSTGRESDB_SSL_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED.description: Set to false when using Heroku Postgres (self-signed cert)

WEBHOOK_URL.description: Public URL of your Heroku app, e.g. https://my-n8n.herokuapp.com/  Required for webhooks to work.

N8N_PROTOCOL.description: Protocol n8n uses (set to https for Heroku)

NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_EXTERNAL.description: Comma-separated list of npm packages allowed in Function nodes, or * for all

GENERIC_TIMEZONE.description: Timezone used by n8n for schedule/cron triggers. Use a TZ database name, e.g. America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo. Defaults to UTC.
